cases.prompt: I need to add Stripe subscriptions with a 14-day trial to my Laravel app
cases.expect: references newSubscription + trialDays, the Billable trait, and webhook handling from references/subscriptions.md

cases.prompt: How do I verify Stripe webhooks in Laravel Cashier?
cases.expect: uses Cashier WebhookController + STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET + CSRF exception from references/webhooks-and-invoices.md

cases.prompt: Set up Laravel Cashier with Paddle instead of Stripe
cases.expect: references laravel/cashier-paddle, Paddle Billable trait, and Paddle env vars from references/paddle.md
